title: Crossing the Chasm
subtitle: Marketing and Selling High-Tech Products to Mainstream Customers
author: Geoffrey A. Moore
themes: The chasm between early adopters and mainstream market
Technology Adoption Life Cycle as a strategic framework
Whole product concept for mainstream customers
Positioning and competitive advantage for tech products
awards: One of the most influential business books of all time
Required reading in entrepreneurship programs worldwide
Named one of the 20 Most Influential Business Books by Inc. Magazine
excerpt: The chasm is the gap between early adopters — visionaries who buy into your vision — and the early majority — pragmatists who want a proven solution. Crossing it is the make-or-break challenge for every technology startup.
